news:news.news:title: The world faces escalating tensions with violence in Lebanon, a humanitarian crisis in Greece, and political turmoil in the US.
news:news.news:keywords: Lebanon violence and journalism, US political protests, migrant crisis in Greece, Egypt energy crisis, Bank of America Epstein lawsuit

news:news.news:title: US stock markets faced a downturn for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: US stock market trends, impact of Iran war on economy, minimum wage increase efforts, Ticketmaster fee adjustments, US-Canada border business challenges

news:news.news:title: Suno's latest AI music model update emphasizes user customization, while Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers various deals amid a competitive retail landscape.
news:news.news:keywords: AI music model updates, Amazon Spring Sale deals, Meta legal challenges, OpenAI video generation news, gaming headset discounts

news:news.news:title: The USMNT faced a significant setback against Belgium, while Luka Doncic received a suspension impacting the Lakers' upcoming game.
news:news.news:keywords: March Madness updates, USMNT World Cup preparations, NBA playoff implications

news:news.news:title: New research links erythritol to brain damage and stroke risk, while discoveries in carbon capture and human origins reshape scientific understanding.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, carbon capture technology advancements, human evolution discoveries, animal behavior research, cosmic phenomena explanations

news:news.news:title: Nepal's former Prime Minister was arrested following a deadly protest crackdown, while global tensions rise with Iran and North Korea's military ties.
news:news.news:keywords: Nepal protest crackdown, UN vote on slavery reparations, Iran military tensions, Cuba aid ships missing, euthanasia legal battles in Spain

news:news.news:title: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: US stock market trends, Trump's economic policies, minimum wage increase movements, impact of Iran war on US economy, rising costs of living in America

news:news.news:title: Sony has suspended sales of its memory cards due to shortages, while various tech products are on sale during the Big Spring Sale.
news:news.news:keywords: memory card shortages, Big Spring Sale discounts, new tech product launches, impact of data centers on environment, White House app features

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods was arrested for DUI following a car crash, while college basketball teams advance in the NCAA tournament.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest, NCAA tournament updates, Connecticut Sun franchise sale

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into human origins, bee nutrition, and the effects of Mars dust storms on water loss.
news:news.news:keywords: human evolution discoveries, bee nutrition breakthroughs, Mars water loss research, animal behavior studies, ocean species extinction

news:news.news:title: US Stocks Sink for Fifth Week as Iran War Fuels Oil Prices and Market Anxiety
Tiger Woods Arrested for DUI After Car Crash, Adding to Sports Drama Amid NCAA Tournament Excitement
